question: What material is the 'Pylon of Ozym' made from?

answers.ground_truth: The Pylon of Ozym is made from solidified, hyper-dense neutrino-ium.
answers.original: The Pylon of Ozym is made from solidified, hyper-dense neutrino-ium.

ops.description: Yandr is one of the four moons of Quixar and is tidally locked to the planet.
The Shadow Fen's dark magic nullifies the magical energy of a Sunstone Amulet.
Not every shining gem holds magical power.

entities.name: Pylon of Ozym
entities.description: The Pylon of Ozym is a large monolith made of solidified, hyper-dense neutrino-ium, located in the San-Grel desert, standing 1,337 meters tall, and emitting a low, constant hum.

entities.name: Ancient-Heartwood
entities.description: Ancient-Heartwood is the heartwood of thousand-year-old mountain trees, retaining the wisdom of centuries.

entities.name: Ozym
entities.description: Ozym is a local tribal word meaning 'eternal' or 'unwavering', referring to the Pylon of Ozym.

entities.name: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' Staffs
entities.description: Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood and crowned with a Resonance-Stone, amplifying earth-based magic.

entities.name: Aethelgard
entities.description: Aethelgard is a region with a southern border adjacent to the Shadow Fen, and it has a royal family associated with Sunstone Amulets.<SEP>Aethelgard is the capital of Eldoria, with a population of over 300 million people, situated beside the Great Waterfall of the Kings.<SEP>Aethelgard is the capital of Eldoria, with a population of over 300 million people and features architecture built around ancient trees.

entities.name: Ancient Trees
entities.description: Ancient trees are part of the Elderwood Forest and contribute to its sacred atmosphere.

relations.description: The Pylon of Ozym is located in the center of the San-Grel desert.
Local legends attribute the placement of the Pylon of Ozym to the sky gods from another world.
Terran 'Stone-Speaker' staffs are carved from Ancient-Heartwood.
The name 'Ozym' refers to the Pylon of Ozym and means 'eternal' or 'unwavering' in the local tribal language.
Aethelgard's architecture features structures built around ancient trees.
The Pylon of Ozym is composed entirely of solidified, hyper-dense neutrino-ium.
The Pylon of Ozym is made of solidified, hyper-dense neutrino-ium, a previously impossible state of matter.

entities.name: Digital Performance Capture
entities.description: Digital performance capture is a technique used by actors in Celestia.

entities.name: Neridian Depth-Armor
entities.description: Neridian Depth-Armor is a protective suit constructed with Pressure-Scales and Abyssal-Resin, allowing exploration of deep ocean trenches.

entities.name: Crystal-Quartz
entities.description: Crystal-Quartz is the material used for the visor of the Pathfinder Helm, providing impact protection.
